name: ENSHU Limited
summary: ENSHU Limited manufactures and sells machine tools and parts in Japan and internationally. It offers system equipment, such as flexible transfer lines, flexible manufacturing systems, and other production lines controlled by computers; and general-purpose machines, which include machining centers and NC machines, as well as high power laser diode and diode plastic welding systems. The company also manufactures parts for motorcycle engines, snowmobiles, golf carts, buggies, and other vehicles; and machines and assembles diesel engines. ENSHU Limited was founded in 1920 and is headquartered in Hamamatsu, Japan.
